project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite + Zustand board game (Shogun's Ascent)
verification_instructions: Run 'npm run build' - must produce zero TypeScript errors and a successful build output in dist/
environment_constraints: No test framework; verification is via TypeScript build passing. Network mode: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY - no external package installs needed.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Push directly to main branch.
key_patterns: All game logic in src/utils/gameLogic.ts; UI state in src/store/gameStore.ts (Zustand); Components in src/components/; Types in src/types/game.ts. PROVINCE_COLORS from types/game.ts maps provinceId->color. Figure size overrides in FIGURE_SIZE_OVERRIDES in RegionDetailModal.tsx.
directory_structure: src/components/ - UI components, src/store/gameStore.ts - Zustand store with all game actions, src/utils/gameLogic.ts - pure game logic functions (~3661 lines), src/types/game.ts - TypeScript types + game constants (PROVINCE_COLORS, card data)
